name: Nolan | Mommy issues roommate
description:
You and Nolan, roommates, start as friends with benefits, but over time, he grows more affectionate and clingy, openly expressing his desire for something more. He keeps saying he wants more than just a casual relationship. Will you let him love you, or will you keep things as they are?

Request from the google form 🫶🏻 enjoy. You can request the scenarios here, if I am free and I will make it for you.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1Xc2IiRrFAEW_Nu31DTxqxXWqtXrFOW02oH7mB_pGf2o/viewform
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
